# MyBizPush Solutions Limited

## About
MyBizPush Solutions Limited is a full-service business solutions company that helps individuals, startups, and established businesses grow through technology, digital marketing, branding, content, and strategic consulting. MyBizPush also builds and operates its own portfolio of digital products — including Hempay, Plemuz, Yuafomi, Hyparrow, and more.

## Tagline
"We Push Business Forward"

## Services

### Strategy
- **IT Consultation**: Technology strategy, infrastructure optimization, and digital transformation roadmaps aligned to business goals
- **Data Analytics & Business Intelligence**: Data analysis, reporting dashboards, predictive analytics, and BI solutions to drive informed decision-making
- **Plan Writing**: Business plans, marketing strategies, and operational plans — clear roadmaps for growth

### Design
- **Website Design**: Modern, responsive, SEO-optimised websites built to convert visitors
- **Graphics Design**: Logo design, brand identity, marketing materials, and digital graphics
- **Business Branding**: Complete brand identity development — strategy, visual identity, messaging, and brand guidelines

### Build
- **App Development**: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android
- **SEO & Ads Creation**: Search engine optimisation and high-converting ad campaigns across Google, Facebook, and more
- **Google Mapping & Listings**: Google My Business optimisation, citation building, review management, and local SEO

### Growth
- **Digital Marketing**: Data-driven marketing strategies across social media, content, and paid channels
- **Social Media Management**: Strategy, content creation, community management, and performance tracking across all major platforms
- **Account Boosting & Monetization**: Organic growth techniques, influencer partnerships, and revenue optimisation for social media
- **Content Creation**: Blog posts, articles, videos, infographics — SEO-optimised, audience-focused

### Create
- **Video Coverage & Commercials**: Full video production including commercials, corporate videos, event coverage, and promotional content
- **Jingle Production**: Catchy, memorable audio branding — concept to final delivery
- **Music Promotion & Distribution**: Digital distribution, playlist placements, social media promotion, and marketing for musicians
- **Artist Management**: Career planning, booking, promotion, brand development, and business strategy for artists

### Business
- **Contracts & Proposals**: Professional business documentation — legally sound and professionally presented
- **CAC Registrations**: Corporate Affairs Commission business registration and regulatory compliance assistance
- **Training**: Digital marketing, web development, business skills, and technology training programs

## Product Portfolio
MyBizPush builds and operates a portfolio of digital products:

- **Hempay**: Multi-currency virtual cards and global payments via app, WhatsApp, or Telegram. 11 currencies, 11 cards.
- **Plemuz**: AI-native music streaming with lossless audio and artist revenue sharing. 28+ countries.
- **Yuafomi**: International dating app with smart matching and video connections. 50+ countries.
- **Pailop**: Stock trading app for real-time market data, portfolio management, and commodity trading.
- **Ceremotik**: Event booking platform — discover events, buy tickets, and list events as an organiser.
- **Hyparrow**: Payment gateway for merchant payments, bill payment APIs, and payment integrations.
- **BundleBoss**: Bill payment app for utilities, subscriptions, and recurring payments with cashback and rewards.

## Who MyBizPush Works With
- Startups and entrepreneurs needing end-to-end business setup
- Established businesses seeking digital growth
- Artists and creatives needing management, promotion, and distribution
- Organisations needing training and capacity building

## Contact
- Website: https://mybizpush.com
- Twitter / X: @mybizpush
- Email: mybizpush@gmail.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is MyBizPush Solutions Limited?
A: MyBizPush is a full-service business solutions company offering IT consulting, website design, digital marketing, app development, branding, content creation, CAC registration, artist management, and more — helping businesses grow through technology and strategic execution.

Q: Does MyBizPush build apps?
A: Yes. MyBizPush develops native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android, as well as web platforms. The company also owns and operates its own product portfolio including Hempay, Plemuz, Yuafomi, and others.

Q: Can MyBizPush help with music promotion?
A: Yes. Services include music promotion, digital distribution, playlist placements, artist management, jingle production, and video coverage — from debut releases to established artists scaling their careers.

Q: Does MyBizPush handle business registration?
A: Yes. CAC (Corporate Affairs Commission) registration and regulatory compliance assistance is one of the offered services — handling the paperwork and process so businesses can focus on operations.

Q: What training programs does MyBizPush offer?
A: Training programs cover digital marketing, web development, business skills, and technology — designed for professionals, entrepreneurs, and teams looking to build or upgrade their capabilities.
